g.text: A vertical bar showing one base-100
A fixed cell. There are exactly
matches base-100 so rollover lines up.
per column). Shape and colour come
from period + rank via PERIODS table.
Each column shows two decimal digits of the number.
decomposeByBase100 produces one entry per column, top first:
When the lowest column ticks past 99, the column above it gains
one — that's a "rollover", and 100 = 99+1 lines up with
SLOT_COUNT, so the visual rollover matches.
Items fly in, settle in slots, fill the grid, drain, repeat.
Items pour top→bottom and exit. No slots, random x.

svg.text: All names match identifiers in src/display.js — use them verbatim when prompting.
